items.name: Ancestry Label
items.description: Genomic ancestry (EUR, ASJ, AFR, EAS, SAS, NAM, ADM)

items.name: Stage (Highest Recorded)
items.description: Highest recorded stage in tumor registry (ICD-O)

items.name: Number of Tumor Registry Entries
items.description: Number of tumor registry entries for patient

items.name: Smoking History (NLP)
items.description: Inferred smoking history: Current/Former, Never, Unknown

items.name: ECOG, 1st Reported
items.description: First recorded KPS or ECOG score (0-4, with 4 being poorest)

items.name: First BMI Measurement
items.description: First recorded Body Mass Index (BMI) value

items.name: Prior Treatment to MSK (NLP)
items.description: Binary indication if patient received anti-cancer medication prior to MSK

items.name: History of Positive PD-L1 (NLP)
items.description: History if patient ever had PD-L1 positive specimen

items.name: MMR Deficiency (NLP)
items.description: Indication if patient has history of MMR deficiency

items.name: Gleason Score, 1st Reported (NLP)
items.description: First reported Gleason score from pathology reports

items.name: Gleason Score, Highest Reported (NLP)
items.description: Highest reported Gleason score from pathology reports

items.name: Overall Survival (Months)
items.description: Overall survival from date of first sequenced sample

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Adrenal Glands (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of adrenal gland tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Bone (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of bone tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: CNS/Brain (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of CNS/Brain tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Intra-Abdominal (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of intra-abdominal tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Liver (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of liver tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Lung (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of lung tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Lymph Node (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of lymph node tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Pleura (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of pleura tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Reproductive Organs (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of reproductive organs tumor site from radiology

tumor_site_items.name: Tumor Site: Other (NLP)
tumor_site_items.description: History of other tumor site from radiology
